validation.tagName.invalidChars: Tag name can only contain letters, numbers, underscores (_) and hyphens (-)
validation.tagName.pureNumeric: Tag name must contain at least one letter, underscore or hyphen
validation.subTagName.invalidChars: Sub-tag name can only contain letters, numbers, underscores (_) and hyphens (-)
validation.accountName.hasEmoji: Account name cannot contain emoji characters
notice.accountBalanceUnavailable: Unable to get account balance, please try again later
notice.fillBudgetName: Please fill in budget name and amount
notice.fillGoalName: Please fill in goal name and target amount
notice.amountRangeInvalid: Invalid amount range: minimum is greater than maximum
notice.dateRangeInvalid: Invalid date range: start date is after end date
notice.widthInvalid: Width must be a number between 200 and 1200
notice.heightInvalid: Height must be a number between 150 and 800
error.noData: No data yet, please add entries first
error.pathExcluded: Path "{path}" is in the exclude list, the query will not return any results
error.pathNotIncluded: Path "{path}" is not in the include list, the query may not return expected results
cashlogModal.title: Create or Edit Entry
cashlogModal.amountDesc: Enter a positive number; sign is determined by type
cashlogModal.balanceChangeDesc: Set the adjusted balance for each account
chartModal.title: Insert Chart
chartModal.tagFilterDesc: Select tags to filter. Multiple tags use OR logic. Leaving all unchecked is equivalent to selecting all (no tag filtering).
chartModal.descFilterDesc: Optional, leave empty to skip filtering. Use OR to connect multiple keywords, e.g.: train OR flight
chartModal.amountRangeDesc: Optional, compares absolute values, leave empty for no limit
chartModal.dateRangeDesc: Optional, leave empty for no limit. To use natural language dates (e.g., this month) or relative dates, edit the code block manually.
chartModal.pathFilterDesc: Optional, leave empty to skip filtering. Use OR to connect multiple paths, e.g.: ledger/2026 OR journal
chartModal.showGroupSubtotalDesc: Show income/expense subtotals at the end of each group
chartModal.xGroupByDesc: Determines what each bar group represents on the x-axis
chartModal.xGroupByTimeDesc: Determines the time dimension on the x-axis
chartModal.splitByBarDesc: Determines what each bar within a group represents
chartModal.splitItems.autoDesc: Automatically collected from data, no manual selection needed
chartModal.splitItems.fixedBar: Fixed to net balance, income, and expense bars
chartModal.splitItems.fixedLine: Fixed to net balance, income, and expense lines
chartModal.splitItems.fixedPie: When grouped by tag/type, shows absolute values. Hover to see signed actual values.
chartModal.pieGroupByDesc: Determines what each pie slice represents
chartModal.pieValueTypeAccountDesc: Show total amount changes for accounts (including transfers and balance adjustments)
chartModal.pieValueTypeTimeDesc: Show income and expenses only (excluding transfers and balance adjustments)
settings.heading: Cashlog Settings
settings.incomeTag.name: Income tag
settings.incomeTag.desc: Main tag name for income entries
settings.expenseTag.name: Expense tag
settings.expenseTag.desc: Main tag name for expense entries
settings.transferTag.name: Transfer tag
settings.transferTag.desc: Main tag name for transfer entries
settings.balanceChangeTag.name: Balance change tag
settings.balanceChangeTag.desc: Main tag name for balance change entries
settings.subTagPresets.desc: Please configure in the Cashlog sidebar settings page
settings.enableAccounts.name: Enable accounts
settings.enableAccounts.desc: When enabled, you can select accounts when creating entries, and use transfers and balance adjustments. Configure in the Cashlog sidebar settings page.
settings.enableAttachments.name: Enable attachments
settings.enableAttachments.desc: When enabled, you can upload images as attachments when creating entries
settings.attachmentFolder.name: Attachment folder
settings.attachmentFolder.desc: Attachments will be stored in this folder
settings.attachmentFolder.placeholder: Enter folder path, supports fuzzy search
settings.enableBudgets.name: Enable budgets
settings.enableBudgets.desc: When enabled, you can set and view expense budgets in the panel
settings.enableGoals.name: Enable goals
settings.enableGoals.desc: When enabled, you can set and view income goals in the panel
settings.statsMode.name: Statistics mode
settings.monthStartDay.name: Month start day
settings.monthStartDay.desc: Set the start day of each month (1-28). For example, setting to 15 means statistics start from the 15th of each month.
settings.weekStartDay.name: Week start day
settings.weekStartDay.desc: Set the first day of the week
settings.showEditButton.name: Show edit button in query results
settings.showEditButton.desc: When enabled, an edit button appears next to each entry in query results. Click to edit that entry.
settings.showNoteLink.name: Show note link in query results
settings.showNoteLink.desc: When enabled, a source note link appears next to each entry in query results. Click to navigate to the note.
settings.globalQuery.name: Global query
settings.globalQuery.desc: Instructions automatically appended to every query
settings.globalQuery.placeholder:
e.g.:
sort by date ascending
sort by amount descending
group by tag
limit to 50
...
settings.excludePaths.name: Exclude paths
settings.excludePaths.desc: Exclude these paths from indexing. Separate with commas (e.g., Templates, journal/2025). Leave empty to exclude nothing. Mutually exclusive with include paths.
settings.includePaths.name: Include paths
settings.includePaths.desc: Only index files in these paths. Separate with commas (e.g., journal, ledger/2026-01-01.md). Leave empty to index all paths. Mutually exclusive with exclude paths.
settings.reset.name: Reset to defaults
settings.reset.desc: Restore all settings to default values
settings.placeholder.name: Name
panelSettings.attachmentFolderPlaceholde: Enter folder path, supports fuzzy search
panelSettings.noBudget: No budgets yet, click below to add
panelSettings.noGoal: No goals yet, click below to add
panelSettings.restoreDefaultsDesc: Restore all settings to default values
panelSettings.balanceWarning: It is not recommended to directly modify the initial account balance. To adjust an account balance, create an entry in a note with the type "Balance Change".
panelSettings.deleteSubTagDesc: Deleting a sub-tag will also delete all entries under it. Are you sure you want to delete?
panelSettings.mergeSubTagDesc: This sub-tag already exists. Do you want to merge "{oldTag}" into "{existingTag}"?
panelSettings.mergeToBaseDesc: Do you want to merge {oldFullTag} into {baseTag}?
panelSettings.deleteAccountDesc: Select an account to transfer all entries from "{account}" to. After transfer, the account name will be deleted.
dashboard.accountDetail.title: 💳 {account} Balance Details
